programme.desc: Scooby enters Shaggy into a poetry slam contest in Central Park; when Shaggy finds out he's going up against famous singer-songwriter Halsey he freaks, then freaks even more when the event is attacked by a horrible gator-man-monster from the sewers.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo and Guess Who?

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: To escape a snowstorm, the gang checks into a big, creepy hotel run by a man very strict about the hotel rules established by his deceased mother.

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: The gang tours an old Hollywood Studio; they soon uncover a mystery concerning the ghost of a silent film comedy star who has returned to make sure his recently discovered final film is never seen.

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 16
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.title: SEINDAH CINTA MUTIARA 41
programme.desc: It tells the story of Mutiara, who must struggle hard in order to live a decent life. However, problems keep coming one after another, forcing Mutiara to become even stronger to survive them. There are even people around her who are always cruel and hateful toward her. Fortunately, there is Diandra, a friend who never stops supporting Mutiara and encouraging her to keep going.

programme.title: RAHASIA DAN CINTA 20
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent business tycoon, is arranged to marry Greg. The two are brought together because their fathers want to merge their companies. Dwita's father knows that she will most likely reject this plan. Therefore, he provides her with a new facility—a bodyguard named Debu. Thus begins the journey of Dwita, Greg, and Debu, as various problems start to arise in Dwita's life.

programme.title: Jack Stein: In The Box
programme.desc: Jack explores the relationship between pork and apples. Then, he hits the streets of Bangkok, and he adds an Asian twist to the British classic pork bun and apple sauce.

programme.title: Jack Stein: In The Box
programme.desc: Jack takes inspiration from the 1700s for his latest adventure. In Darwin, Australia, he gets creative with crocodile and mud crab when he realises he's missed shrimp season.

programme.desc: As Chris and Billy psych up for the big challenge race, Billy's mechanical issues force a hilarious change in plans. And losing the challenge gives the term “Drag Strip” a whole new meaning.

programme.title: Jet Truck
